productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Zeitfrei Slide Black Flip Flops
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas slide-on flip flops are absolutely comfortable and stylish. With quick drying properties, these slides make for great footwear even in wet conditions. Upper Non-absorbent EVA bandage upper for quick drying Velcro closure on the strap for a customised Fit Patented adidas three stripes on the strap for style Midsole Highly padded and extra soft FitFOAM footbed for ultimate comfort Outsole Injected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Diagonal grooves on the outsole for absolute grip and traction even on wet surfaces Flip flop care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Not for shower use
